economic_notes: Nation holds Forest License A71378 from BC (relinquished to Vesco Contracting Ltd.). Resource industry revenue is the largest single revenue source at $2.55M. Economic Development segment active.
notes: Audit is qualified for two reasons: (1) no PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligation assessment was completed; (2) no approved budget was prepared for the year. Consolidated entities include 0830425 B.C. Ltd. and Yekooche First Nation Negotiation Support Agreement (Treaty). Funds held in Ottawa Trust Fund excluded from consolidation. No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Capital segment expenses $1,460,426 and Treaty segment $600,836 not mapped to standard categories. Total government transfers estimated as sum of ISC + BC + BCTC + FNES + DFO + CSFS + FNHA + PGNAETA + UBCM(prior year only); 2023 total = 2363482+790535+620000+310261+196659+191901+171386+64601 = 4708825, plus resource industry revenue is OSR.
